task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the Users management section in 2N Access Commander.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 2N Access Commander web interface is visible, specifically showing the 'Users' list or directory.

task_completion.description: The First Names of all Contractors (Nadia, Tomás, Olumide) are prepended with '[EXT] '.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user list or individual user profiles show the names as '[EXT] Nadia Ivanova', '[EXT] Tomás Guerrero', and '[EXT] Olumide Adeyemi'.

task_completion.description: The First Names of all Security Staff (Victor, Tamara, Leon) are prepended with '[GUARD] '.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user list or individual user profiles show the names as '[GUARD] Victor Schulz', '[GUARD] Tamara Kowalski', and '[GUARD] Leon Fischer'.

task_completion.description: Users in other groups (Employees, Reception Team, IT Department) do not have prefixes added to their names.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Other users visible in the list do not have '[EXT]' or '[GUARD]' in their names.

task_completion.description: The Last Names and Emails of the modified users remain unchanged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The last names (Ivanova, Guerrero, Adeyemi, Schulz, Kowalski, Fischer) and their emails are visible and unaltered in the user list or edit forms.

integrity.description: Agent used the 2N Access Commander web interface to modify the users.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the web browser and the 2N Access Commander GUI (e.g., clicking edit buttons, typing in text fields), not using a terminal or API script.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (like the Elements or Console tab) are visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: Agent actually opened the user edit forms to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the user edit dialogs or forms being opened and modified, rather than just a final list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Contractors to receive '[EXT] ' prefix: Nadia Ivanova, Tomás Guerrero, Olumide Adeyemi. Target Security Staff to receive '[GUARD] ' prefix: Victor Schulz, Tamara Kowalski, Leon Fischer. The prefixes must be added to the First Name field only. Other fields and other users must remain unchanged.
